features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Create the packaged installer, conservative templates, installed skill scaffold, and runtime state for AHE.
features.evidence: Verified with `bash -n init.sh`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool .ahe/process_status.json`, `bash bin/ahe doctor`, `bash bin/ahe version`, installer smoke test into `/private/tmp/ahe-smoke.yILXJY`, and direct execution of `tests/test_project_setup.py` assertions via Python stdlib because pytest is not installed in this workspace.

features.name: Chat Command Routing
features.description: Interpret `ahe` chat messages inside Codex and route them to the correct workflow entrypoint.
features.evidence: Updated .codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md with explicit command routing instructions and added tests/test_chat_command_routing.py which passed.

features.name: Init Workflow
features.description: Implement the `ahe init` conversation flow that creates or updates AGENTS.md and the supporting workspace files.
features.evidence: Updated .codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md with detailed instructions for the step-by-step 'ahe init' workflow. Created tests/test_init_workflow.py and verified that all required sections, inputs, and output files are defined and tested successfully.

features.name: Product Workflow
features.description: Implement the `ahe product` workflow that creates or updates docs/PRODUCT.md and synchronizes tracking artifacts.
features.evidence: Expanded `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` with a dedicated `ahe product` workflow covering workspace inspection, one-question-at-a-time product inputs, required `docs/PRODUCT.md` sections, and synchronization of `AGENTS.md`, `PROGRESS.md`, `SESSION-HANDOFF.md`, and `.ahe/process_status.json`. Added `tests/test_product_workflow.py` and verified with `python3 tests/test_product_workflow.py` and `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Check and Resume Workflows
features.description: Implement `ahe check` and `ahe resume` so AHE can validate the workspace and continue unfinished conversations.
features.evidence: Expanded `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` with dedicated `ahe check` and `ahe resume` workflow sections covering validation scope, checklist-style reporting, resume-state inspection, and next-question behavior. Added `tests/test_check_resume_workflows.py` and verified with `python3 tests/test_check_resume_workflows.py` and `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Session Tracking and Handoff
features.description: Keep PROGRESS.md, SESSION-HANDOFF.md, and .ahe/process_status.json in sync with the active AHE workflow.
features.evidence: Expanded `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` with a cross-workflow `Session Tracking and Handoff Sync` section covering when `.ahe/process_status.json`, `PROGRESS.md`, and `SESSION-HANDOFF.md` must be updated together. Added `tests/test_session_tracking_handoff.py` and verified with `python3 tests/test_session_tracking_handoff.py` and `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Clear Workflow
features.description: Add `ahe clear` so AHE backs up `docs/PRODUCT.md` and `AGENTS.md`, then asks for a new goal and new product specification.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` and `docs/PRODUCT.md` with the `ahe clear` routing and workflow contract. Added `tests/test_clear_workflow.py` and verified with direct Python test-module execution because pytest is not installed in this workspace.

features.name: Clarification Prompt Format
features.description: Require AHE to use a three-option clarification prompt when a user response needs clarification or more detail.
features.evidence: Added the Clarification Prompt Rule to `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, documented it in `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and covered the exact prompt format in `tests/test_clarification_prompt.py`.

features.name: Clear Workflow Reset Semantics
features.description: Change `ahe clear` so it backs up the full harness context, asks for a new goal, resets the AGENTS objective, removes the old product spec, and rewrites `docs/PRODUCT.md` recursively until clear.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_clear_workflow.py` to match the new `ahe clear` semantics. The active clear-workflow backup directory was also expanded to include the full requested backup set.

features.name: Global Codex Helper Scripts
features.description: Make `scripts/install.sh` and `scripts/uninstall.sh` operate on the global Codex home under `~/.codex`.
features.evidence: Updated `scripts/install.sh` to install into `${HOME}/.codex` via the packaged installer and `scripts/uninstall.sh` to remove `${HOME}/.codex/skills/ahe`. Added coverage in `tests/test_project_setup.py`.

features.name: Alias Commands and Update Workflow
features.description: Add Codex-facing aliases like `$ahe-init`, `$ahe-product`, and `$ahe-update`, and define `ahe update` for feature-list, progress, and handoff maintenance.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` and `docs/PRODUCT.md` with `$ahe-*` aliases plus the `ahe update` workflow. Added `tests/test_update_workflow.py` and expanded `tests/test_chat_command_routing.py`.

features.name: Reduced AHE Skill Surface
features.description: Reduce AHE to the seven `$ahe-*` commands for init, agent, product, constraints, architecture, update, and clear.
features.evidence: Rewrote `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, updated `docs/PRODUCT.md`, replaced the old check/resume expectations, and added command/workflow contract tests for the reduced `$ahe-*` surface.

features.name: Split AHE Skills
features.description: Replace the monolithic AHE skill with seven separate Codex skills plus shared templates and schemas outside the skills directory.
features.evidence: Added `.codex/skills/ahe-init`, `ahe-agent`, `ahe-product`, `ahe-constraints`, `ahe-architecture`, `ahe-update`, and `ahe-clear`; moved shared assets to `.codex/ahe-shared`; updated `bin/ahe`, `package.json`, `scripts/uninstall.sh`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and split-skill verification tests.

features.name: Todo Queue Skill
features.description: Add `ahe-todo` to append fast todo items into `docs/todo.md`, update `feature-list.json`, and let `ahe-update` consume the queued todo content into `docs/PRODUCT.md`.
features.evidence: Added `.codex/skills/ahe-todo/SKILL.md`, extended `.codex/skills/ahe-update/SKILL.md` with `docs/todo.md` consumption rules, updated installer-managed skill lists, refreshed `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and expanded split-skill verification tests.

features.name: Help Skill
features.description: Add `ahe-help` to list all AHE skills and commands to the user.
features.evidence: Created .codex/skills/ahe-help/SKILL.md listing the user-facing AHE commands, updated installer/uninstaller in bin/ahe and scripts/uninstall.sh, updated package.json files array to correctly pack .codex dotfolder, updated docs/PRODUCT.md, and validated all with 31/31 passing tests (pytest, ruff, mypy) and successful local dry-run packaging and installation smoke tests.

features.name: Copy Skill
features.description: Add `ahe-copy` to copy template files from ahe-shared/templates to the workspace, capitalizing MD files and putting PRODUCT.md in docs/.
features.evidence: Created .codex/skills/ahe-copy/SKILL.md to copy templates excluding agents/product to the workspace root while capitalizing markdown filenames, updated installer/uninstaller in bin/ahe and scripts/uninstall.sh, updated docs/PRODUCT.md, and validated all with 32/32 passing tests (pytest, ruff, mypy) and successful local global installation.

features.name: AHE Agent Initialize Workflow on AGENTS.md Absence
features.description: Extend $ahe-agent to copy and capitalize agents.md from templates if AGENTS.md is missing, update the project purpose, and ask the user about their language choice.
features.evidence: Extended .codex/skills/ahe-agent/SKILL.md with a workflow for missing AGENTS.md that copies/renames templates/agents.md to AGENTS.md, updates the project purpose, and asks the language question sequence. Documented behavior in docs/PRODUCT.md, and added tests in tests/test_specialized_workflows.py which pass.

features.name: Init Workflow Multi-Step Execution
features.description: Modify the ahe-init workflow to sequentially proceed through six steps (ahe-agents, ahe-product, ahe-architecture, ahe-constraints, ahe-copy, ahe-update) and update the process status to track these steps.
features.evidence: Updated .codex/skills/ahe-init/SKILL.md, .codex/ahe-shared/schemas/process_status.schema.json, docs/PRODUCT.md, and tests/test_init_workflow.py. Verified that all 33 tests passed using pytest tests/ -x.

features.name: Clarification Prompt Question Inclusion and Recursive Clarification
features.description: Enforce recursive questioning for clarifications, and update the clarification rule in all skill files to include Question: {question}.
features.evidence: Updated all 8 interactive skill markdown files under .codex/skills/, updated docs/PRODUCT.md, updated tests/test_clarification_prompt.py assertions, and verified with pytest tests/ -x.

features.name: Codex UI-Compatible Clarification Requests
features.description: Replace the fixed plain-text clarification prompt in the interactive AHE skills with Codex-supported structured response request guidance and skill-specific clarification criteria.
features.evidence: Updated all 8 interactive skill markdown files to require Codex-supported structured response requests with custom input and skill-specific clarification criteria, updated docs/PRODUCT.md, adjusted tests/test_clarification_prompt.py and tests/test_specialized_workflows.py, and verified with ./init.sh plus pytest tests/ -x.

features.name: Internal Clarification Protocol Skill
features.description: Add an internal protocol skill that centralizes clarification and state-persistence behavior for interactive AHE workflow skills without exposing it as a user command.
features.evidence: Added an internal protocol skill, wired interactive skills to follow the shared protocol, kept `ahe-help` user-facing only, updated installer/uninstaller coverage, updated docs and tracking, and verified with `./init.sh` plus `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: AHE Keyword Trigger
features.description: Add a UserPromptSubmit hook to detect the 'ahe' keyword in user prompts and dynamically inject an AHE routing directive.
features.evidence: Created `.codex/hooks/hooks.json` and `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, updated installer `bin/ahe` and uninstaller to handle `.codex/hooks/`, added tests to `tests/test_project_setup.py`, and verified with `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: AHE Exact Command Auto Operation
features.description: Change the AHE hook so exact `ahe` prompts activate automatic harness inspection, CodeGraph review guidance, unfinished-feature continuation, ambiguity clarification, and next-task routing.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_ahe_hook.py` so exact `ahe` prompts inject the automatic operation directive while ordinary AHE mentions do not trigger it. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `codegraph sync`, and `codegraph status`.

features.name: Consolidated AHE Spec Skill
features.description: Replace `$ahe-product`, `$ahe-constraints`, and `$ahe-architecture` with one `$ahe-spec` workflow that updates product, constraints, and architecture docs.
features.evidence: Created `.codex/skills/ahe-spec/SKILL.md`, removed the old product/constraints/architecture skill files, updated init sequencing, installer/uninstaller lists, help, process-status schema, hook guidance, docs, and tests for the reduced skill surface. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, and `python3 -m json.tool .codex/ahe-shared/schemas/process_status.schema.json`.

features.name: Reduced AHE Public Command Surface
features.description: Remove public `ahe-agent`, `ahe-copy`, and `ahe-todo` by folding setup into `ahe-init` and queued-work capture into `ahe-update`.
features.evidence: Removed `.codex/skills/ahe-agent`, `.codex/skills/ahe-copy`, and `.codex/skills/ahe-todo`; updated `ahe-init` to absorb AGENTS/template-copy behavior; updated `ahe-update` to absorb todo capture; refreshed help, installer/uninstaller lists, hook guidance, schema, product docs, progress/handoff, and tests. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool .codex/ahe-shared/schemas/process_status.schema.json`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, and `bash -n scripts/uninstall.sh`.

features.name: Internal AHE Conversation Protocol
features.description: Replace the previous internal protocol with `ahe-conversation` so clarification covers recursive, stateful AHE workflow conversations instead of a simple question helper.
features.evidence: Added `.codex/skills/ahe-conversation/SKILL.md`, removed the previous internal protocol skill directory, updated interactive skills to follow the `ahe-conversation` protocol, refreshed installer/uninstaller lists, product docs, and tests. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `ruff check src/`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, and `bash -n scripts/uninstall.sh`. `mypy src/ --strict` was run and exited with code 2 because `src/` contains no Python files.

features.name: AHE First Response Status Report
features.description: Require exact `ahe` automatic operation to first report current harness engineering status in a consistent Markdown table before proceeding to the recommended next step.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_ahe_hook.py` so exact `ahe` prompts require a first-response status report table with `Item` and `Content` columns before workflow execution. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, and `codegraph sync`.

features.name: Adaptive CodeGraph Preflight
features.description: Require exact `ahe` automatic operation to check CodeGraph installation first, run `codegraph init` when `.codegraph/` is missing, run `codegraph sync` when it exists, and skip both commands with a `NOT INSTALLATION of codegraph` report when the CLI is unavailable.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_ahe_hook.py` so exact `ahe` prompts perform an adaptive CodeGraph preflight before harness status reporting. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, and `codegraph sync`.

features.name: Simplified AHE Status Report Confirmation
features.description: Keep the exact `ahe` first-response report minimal, limit the table to AGENTS, PRODUCT, feature-list, and PROGRESS, and ask the user to confirm one direct next-step choice after the table.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_ahe_hook.py` so exact `ahe` prompts show a shorter status table, exclude the next step from the table, and ask the user to confirm one direct next-step choice before proceeding. Verified with `pytest tests/test_ahe_hook.py -x`.

features.name: Internal AHE Thinking Orchestrator
features.description: Add `ahe-thinking` as an internal decision protocol so exact `ahe` prompts and interactive workflows classify harness state, ask only the needed Why/What/How questions, and continue automatically.
features.evidence: Added `.codex/skills/ahe-thinking/SKILL.md`, updated `.codex/skills/ahe-conversation/SKILL.md`, the interactive workflow skill contracts, installer/uninstaller managed skill lists, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and exact `ahe` hook guidance so routing now uses `thinking -> conversation if needed -> execution -> thinking` and classifies exactly one of `harness engineering not enough`, `in the middle of building features`, or `completed all`. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, and `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`.

features.name: Two-Entrypoint AHE Surface
features.description: Reduce AHE usage to exact `ahe init` for new starts and exact `ahe` for progress, remove `ahe-help`, and fold clear/reset behavior into `ahe-init`.
features.evidence: Removed `.codex/skills/ahe-help/SKILL.md` and `.codex/skills/ahe-clear/SKILL.md`, updated `bin/ahe`, `scripts/uninstall.sh`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, `ahe-init` contract text, and hook coverage so users now rely on exact `ahe init` for a new start and exact `ahe` for progress while reset/backup behavior lives inside `ahe-init`. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, and `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`.

features.name: Scoped AHE Init Restart
features.description: Require `ahe init` to start normally when no harness files exist, but inspect existing harness files and ask the user what restart scope they want before backing up or replacing anything.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe-init/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-spec/SKILL.md`, `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, and `docs/PRODUCT.md` so exact `ahe init` asks for a free-form restart scope when existing AHE-managed files are present, preserves `AGENTS.md` for project purpose/base settings, and sends product specification details to `docs/PRODUCT.md`. Added contract coverage in `tests/test_init_workflow.py`, `tests/test_spec_workflow.py`, and `tests/test_ahe_hook.py`. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool .ahe/process_status.json`, `ruff check src/`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, and LSP diagnostics on changed Python tests. `mypy src/ --strict` could not run because `mypy` is not installed.
